definition: Time windows when institutional algorithms are most active.

silver_bullet (silver bullets are micro kill zones)

asian.purpose: Range building. Mark high/low — they WILL be swept in London/NY.

london.targets: The liquidity (Asian high/low) built during accumulation phase

new_york.purpose: Highest volume. 10 AM is THE manipulation event.

london_close.purpose: Distribution continues. London position squaring can create counter-moves.
london_close.tradeable: Medium. Continuation trades if NY direction established.

silver_bullet_windows.connection: Silver bullets are MICRO kill zones where FVGs on M15 have highest probability
